Loaded horizon wreath-cover incidence model.
Core identity: relative ramification is IX + ideal(e3w).
Run the commented slice computations before full symbolic elimination.
codim IX = 5
dim(S/IX) = 6
=== gens massFiberIdeal ===
matrix {{4294967296*M^16-2147483648*M^14*N1^2+469762048*M^12*N1^4-58720256*M^10*N1^6+4587520*M^8*N1^8-229376*M^6*N1^10+7168*M^4*N1^12-128*M^2*N1^14+N1^16-2147483648*M^14*N2^2+671088640*M^12*N1^2*N2^2-75497472*M^10*N1^4*N2^2+2621440*M^8*N1^6*N2^2+163840*M^6*N1^8*N2^2-18432*M^4*N1^10*N2^2+640*M^2*N1^12*N2^2-8*N1^14*N2^2+469762048*M^12*N2^4-75497472*M^10*N1^2*N2^4+2359296*M^8*N1^4*N2^4+65536*M^6*N1^6*N2^4+9216*M^4*N1^8*N2^4-1152*M^2*N1^10*N2^4+28*N1^12*N2^4-58720256*M^10*N2^6+2621440*M^8*N1^2*N2^6+65536*M^6*N1^4*N2^6+4096*M^4*N1^6*N2^6+640*M^2*N1^8*N2^6-56*N1^10*N2^6+4587520*M^8*N2^8+163840*M^6*N1^2*N2^8+9216*M^4*N1^4*N2^8+640*M^2*N1^6*N2^8+70*N1^8*N2^8-229376*M^6*N2^10-18432*M^4*N1^2*N2^10-1152*M^2*N1^4*N2^10-56*N1^6*N2^10+7168*M^4*N2^12+640*M^2*N1^2*N2^12+28*N1^4*N2^12-128*M^2*N2^14-8*N1^2*N2^14+N2^16-2147483648*M^14*N3^2+671088640*M^12*N1^2*N3^2-75497472*M^10*N1^4*N3^2+2621440*M^8*N1^6*N3^2+163840*M^6*N1^8*N3^2-18432*M^4*N1^10*N3^2+640*M^2*N1^12*N3^2-8*N1^14*N3^2+671088640*M^12*N2^2*N3^2-184549376*M^10*N1^2*N2^2*N3^2+22544384*M^8*N1^4*N2^2*N3^2-1703936*M^6*N1^6*N2^2*N3^2+88064*M^4*N1^8*N2^2*N3^2-2816*M^2*N1^10*N2^2*N3^2+40*N1^12*N2^2*N3^2-75497472*M^10*N2^4*N3^2+22544384*M^8*N1^2*N2^4*N3^2-1114112*M^6*N1^4*N2^4*N3^2-69632*M^4*N1^6*N2^4*N3^2+5504*M^2*N1^8*N2^4*N3^2-72*N1^10*N2^4*N3^2+2621440*M^8*N2^6*N3^2-1703936*M^6*N1^2*N2^6*N3^2-69632*M^4*N1^4*N2^6*N3^2-6656*M^2*N1^6*N2^6*N3^2+40*N1^8*N2^6*N3^2+163840*M^6*N2^8*N3^2+88064*M^4*N1^2*N2^8*N3^2+5504*M^2*N1^4*N2^8*N3^2+40*N1^6*N2^8*N3^2-18432*M^4*N2^10*N3^2-2816*M^2*N1^2*N2^10*N3^2-72*N1^4*N2^10*N3^2+640*M^2*N2^12*N3^2+40*N1^2*N2^12*N3^2-8*N2^14*N3^2+469762048*M^12*N3^4-75497472*M^10*N1^2*N3^4+2359296*M^8*N1^4*N3^4+65536*M^6*N1^6*N3^4+9216*M^4*N1^8*N3^4-1152*M^2*N1^10*N3^4+28*N1^12*N3^4-75497472*M^10*N2^2*N3^4+22544384*M^8*N1^2*N2^2*N3^4-1114112*M^6*N1^4*N2^2*N3^4-69632*M^4*N1^6*N2^2*N3^4+5504*M^2*N1^8*N2^2*N3^4-72*N1^10*N2^2*N3^4+2359296*M^8*N2^4*N3^4-1114112*M^6*N1^2*N2^4*N3^4+514048*M^4*N1^4*N2^4*N3^4-4352*M^2*N1^6*N2^4*N3^ === factored generators ===
